html:
Exclusive to:

The Wardrobe is a craftable Structure exclusive to Don't Starve Together. It is found in the Decorations Filter, requires an Alchemy Engine to prototype, and costs 4 Boards and 3 Cut Grass to craft.

Opening the Wardrobe will grant players access to an options menu, allowing them to equip and unequip any Skins players have acquired. If players get in danger, for example by getting into Darkness or being attacked, the Wardrobe and the menu will close automatically.

Contents

  • 1 Skins
  • 2 Trivia
  • 3 Assets
  • 4 Gallery

Skins

Main article: Belongings

  • The Woven - Elegant Lover's Wardrobe skin was introduced during the official Year of the Pig King event in 2019.
  • The Loyal Brambleberry Wardrobe skin was awarded for merging Klei accounts of different platforms.
  • The Loyal Crystallized Cabinet skin was awarded for watching 6 hours of Don't Starve Together on Twitch from March 19, 2020 to April 1, 2020, from April 9, 2020 to April 23, 2020, and from February 4, 2021 to February 11, 2021. It is also available in the Klei Rewards shop for 1,200 Klei points.
  • The Loyal Winter Wardrobe skin was awarded for watching 6 hours of Don't Starve Together on Twitch from December 15, 2020 to January 7, 2021.
Woven - Elegant
Gothic Collection
Gothic Wardrobe
You could have sworn you heard a disapproving growl from deep within when you tried to hang up a Hawaiian shirt.
Woven - Elegant

Love the new look.

This thorny wardrobe will have you looking sharp.
See ingame

Give your clothes that extra sparkle.
Loyal
Merrymaker Collection
Winter Wardrobe
The perfect storage for sweater weather.

Trivia

  • Both Wendy and Wickerbottom mention reading a book about a wardrobe, possibly referencing The Lion, the Witch, and the Wardrobe, the first published book in The Chronicles of Narnia book series.
  • Wagstaff, Wheeler, and the retired Warbucks have quotes for the Wardrobe despite not being playable in Don't Starve Together without mods.

  • burnt
  • opened
  • Brambleberry Wardrobe Build

  • Wardrobe Icon
  • WX-78 using the Wardrobe.
  • A burnt Wardrobe.

“It holds dark, terrible secrets...”
–Wilson
“I want to set it on fire.”
–Willow
“Box of clothes.”
–Wolfgang
“It reminds me of a story I read with Abigail.”
–Wendy
“ROBOTS ARE NOT INTERESTED IN FASHION.”
–WX-78
“This reminds me of a famous book.”
–Wickerbottom
“It is hard to stay neat and tidy in the woods.”
–Woodie
“Fashion without function.”
–Maxwell
“That's where I keep my furs and clöaks.”
–Wigfrid
“We like to pop out and scare our friends sometimes. Haha!”
–Webber
“I wish I'd had the chance to bring more clothes with me.”
–Warly
“Friends holding clothes”
–Wormwood
“I could build a million of these.”
–Winona
“A portal to the fashion dimension.”
–Wortox
“Can play dress-up!”
–Wurt
“I've been keeping my bugs in there when I run out of room in my pockets.”
–Walter
“I could always change my look this time around.”
–Wanda
The Wardrobe is a craftable Structure exclusive to Don't Starve Together. It is found in the Decorations Filter, requires an Alchemy Engine to prototype, and costs 4 Boards and 3 Cut Grass to craft.
Opening the Wardrobe will grant players access to an options menu, allowing them to equip and unequip any Skins players have acquired. If players get in danger, for example by getting into Darkness or being attacked, the Wardrobe and the menu will close automatically.

Skins[edit | edit source]
Main article: Belongings
The Woven - Elegant Lover's Wardrobe skin was introduced during the official Year of the Pig King event in 2019.
The Loyal Brambleberry Wardrobe skin was awarded for merging Klei accounts of different platforms.
The Loyal Crystallized Cabinet skin was awarded for watching 6 hours of Don't Starve Together on Twitch from March 19, 2020 to April 1, 2020, from April 9, 2020 to April 23, 2020, and from February 4, 2021 to February 11, 2021. It is also available in the Klei Rewards shop for 1,200 Klei points.
The Loyal Winter Wardrobe skin was awarded for watching 6 hours of Don't Starve Together on Twitch from December 15, 2020 to January 7, 2021.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Tủ Quần Áo là một Kiến Trúc khả chế dành riêng cho Don't Starve Together. Nó được tìm thấy trong Bộ lọc Trang trí, yêu cầu Máy luyện kim để tạo nguyên mẫu và tốn 4 Ván ép và 3 Cỏ cắt để chế tạo.
title: Wardrobe

{{Exclusivity|Don't Starve Together}} {{Object Infobox |icon=Wardrobe.png |tool = Can be [[Tools#Hammering Tools|Hammered]] {{pic|32|Hammer}} |canBeBurned = 1 |tier = 2 |image = Wardrobe build.png|Normal Wardrobe_Open_Build.png|Opened Wardrobe Burnt.png|Burnt |description = Change your look to suit your mood. |filter = {{pic32|Decorations Filter}} |ingredient1 = Boards |multiplier1 = 4 |ingredient2 = Cut Grass |multiplier2 = 3 |perk = Allows players to equip [[Skins]]. |spawnCode = "wardrobe"}} {{Quotes |wilson = It holds dark, terrible secrets... |willow = I want to set it on fire. |wolfgang = Box of clothes. |wendy = It reminds me of a story I read with Abigail. |wx78 = ROBOTS ARE NOT INTERESTED IN FASHION. |wickerbottom = This reminds me of a famous book. |wigfrid = That's where I keep my furs and clöaks. |woodie = It is hard to stay neat and tidy in the woods. |maxwell = Fashion without function. |webber = We like to pop out and scare our friends sometimes. Haha! |winona = I could build a million of these. |warly = I wish I'd had the chance to bring more clothes with me. |wortox = A portal to the fashion dimension. |wormwood = Friends holding clothes |wurt = Can play dress-up! |walter = I've been keeping my bugs in there when I run out of room in my pockets. |wanda = I could always change my look this time around. |choose = wendy}} The '''Wardrobe''' is a craftable [[Structure]] exclusive to ''[[Don't Starve Together]]''. It is found in the [[Decorations Filter]], requires an [[Alchemy Engine]] to prototype, and costs 4 [[Boards]] and 3 [[Cut Grass]] to craft. Opening the Wardrobe will grant players access to an options menu, allowing them to equip and unequip any [[Skins]] players have acquired. If players get in danger, for example by getting into [[Day-Night Cycle|Darkness]] or being attacked, the Wardrobe and the menu will close automatically. == [[File:Skins Icon.png|32px|link=]] Skins == {{Main|Belongings#Structure Skins|Belongings}} * The '''Woven - Elegant Lover's Wardrobe''' skin was introduced during the official [[Year of the Pig King]] event in 2019. * The '''Loyal Brambleberry Wardrobe''' skin was awarded for [https://accounts.klei.com/account/settings merging Klei accounts] of different platforms. * The '''Loyal Crystallized Cabinet''' skin was awarded for watching 6 hours of ''Don't Starve Together'' on Twitch from March 19, 2020 to April 1, 2020, from April 9, 2020 to April 23, 2020, and from February 4, 2021 to February 11, 2021. It is also available in the Klei Rewards shop for 1,200 Klei points. *The '''Loyal Winter Wardrobe''' skin was awarded for watching 6 hours of ''Don't Starve Together'' on Twitch from December 15, 2020 to January 7, 2021.
{{SkinInfo |image = Gothic Wardrobe Icon.png |rarity = Woven - Elegant |collection = Gothic Collection |name = Gothic Wardrobe |description = You could have sworn you heard a disapproving growl from deep within when you tried to hang up a Hawaiian shirt. }} {{SkinInfo |image = Lover's Wardrobe Icon.png |rarity = Woven - Elegant |collection = Year of the Pig King Collection |name = Lover's Wardrobe |description = Love the new look. |ingame = Lover's Wardrobe.png }} {{SkinInfo |image = Shared Armoire Icon.png |rarity = Woven - Elegant |collection = Hand-me-down Collection |name = Shared Armoire |description = Extra roomy, and indispensable in a game of hide and seek. }} {{SkinInfo |image = Brambleberry Wardrobe Icon.png |rarity = Loyal |name = Brambleberry Wardrobe |description = This thorny wardrobe will have you looking sharp. |ingame = Brambleberry Wardrobe.png }} {{SkinInfo |image = Crystallized Cabinet Icon.png |rarity = Loyal |collection = Crystalline Collection |name = Crystallized Cabinet |description = Give your clothes that extra sparkle. }} {{SkinInfo |image = Winter Wardrobe Icon.png |rarity = Loyal |collection = Merrymaker Collection |name = Winter Wardrobe |description = The perfect storage for sweater weather. }}
=={{Pic32|Placeholder}} Trivia== * Both [[Wendy]] and [[Wickerbottom]] mention reading a book about a wardrobe, possibly referencing ''[[wikipedia:The_Lion,_the_Witch_and_the_Wardrobe|The Lion, the Witch, and the Wardrobe]]'', the first published book in ''[[Wikipedia:The Chronicles of Narnia|The Chronicles of Narnia]]'' book series. * [[Wagstaff]], [[Wheeler]], and the retired [[Warbucks]] have quotes for the Wardrobe despite not being playable in ''Don't Starve Together'' without mods. == {{Pic32|Research Notes}} Assets == Wardrobe build.png|build Wardrobe Active.gif|activated Wardrobe Burnt.png|burnt Wardrobe_Open_Build.png|opened Brambleberry Wardrobe Build.png|Brambleberry Wardrobe Build =={{Pic32|Blueprint}} Gallery== Wardrobe.png|Wardrobe Icon Wx-78 using wardrobe.PNG|WX-78 using the Wardrobe. burnt Wardrobe.PNG|A burnt Wardrobe. {{Craftable Items|structure}} [[es:Guardarropas]] [[fr:Garde-robe]] [[Category:Structures]] [[Category:Decorations Filter]] [[Category:Flammable Objects]] [[Category:Craftable Structures]]
